title: Kerala High Court dismisses plea against CMO over bulk WhatsApp messages to government employees
description: The Kerala High Court on Tuesday dismissed a plea alleging that the Chief Minister's Office (CMO) was unlawfully using personal data belonging to government employees and citizens to send bulk WhatsApp messages highlighting the LDF-led State government's achievements ahead of the 2026 assembly elections [Dr Rasheed Ahammed P & anr v State of Kerala and ors].Justice Bechu Kurian Thomas held that the messages that have been sent thus far cannot be considered to be violative of the right to pri
